title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 06 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 06 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 06 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.87 % today, the main contract closed at 980. The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overalltrading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 970 yuan/mt.
